title: CompactStorage
description: Adding upgradable Chests, Backpacks and Barrels!
body:
![Logo](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/cs_logo.jpg?raw=true)
# Welcome to CompactStorage 26.1
**1.21.11 onwards requires [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm/) and Fabric Versions require [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/)**

**1.19.3 to 1.20.6 versions require [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api/)**

# What was new in 26.1.5?
The headline feature of this update is **Upgradable** Item Drums, as well as many reworked Item Drum features making item addition and removal a lot more consistent. As well as a new Void Slot upgrade allows item disposal from within CompactStorage inventores. On top of that, bug fixes!

## Known Issues
- Fully upgraded chests and barrels will not retain contents when broken **this has been fixed in 26.1.9 for 26.2, 26.1.10 for 26.1 and 21.11.11 for 1.21.11. Please update to this version to avoid items being lost.**
- Please report any issues to the [issues page](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/issues)

# Features
## Chests and Barrels

![Chest and Barrel](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/chestAndBarrel.jpg?raw=true)

The Chest and Barrel function as upgradable versions of the vanilla counterparts. These can be upgraded to a maximum size of 21 x 12 using a combination of Width and Height updates. They can also both receieve the Retainer Upgrade and the Void Slot upgrade.

![Max Chest Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CNYyGWn5/images/3a80607f8292749f468ffbd8b8f3d44a27fb257c.jpeg)

<details>
  <summary>Recipes</summary>
  Colorful Chests
  
  ![Colorful Chest Recipes](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/colorfulChests.gif?raw=true)

  Wooden Chests
  
  ![Wooden Chest Recipes](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/woodenChests.gif?raw=true)

  Colorful Barrels
  
  ![Colorful Barrel Recipes](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/colorfulBarrels.gif?raw=true)

  Wooden Barrels
  
  ![Wooden Barrel Recipes](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/woodenBarrels.gif?raw=true)
</details>

## Backpacks

![Worn Backpack](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/backpackWorn.jpg?raw=true)

The Backpack is an on the go storage item which can be opened either by right-clicking or by using Curios / Trinkets (default hotkey: **U**). They can be upgraded to a default size of 21 x 12 and can also receive the Void Slot Upgrade.


<details>
  <summary>Recipes</summary>
  Backpack Recipes
  
![Backpack Recipes](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/colorfulBackpacks.gif?raw=true)

  Wooden Pack Frame Recipes
  
![Wooden Pack Frame Recipes](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/woodenPackFrames.gif?raw=true)
</details>

## Item Drums

![Item Drum](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/itemDrum.jpg?raw=true)

The Item Drum is a storage block which is interaction based, items can be inserted by right clicking and removed by punching. Only **one** item type can be stored in item drums, with 64 stacks being the default size. For a max stack size of 64, this allows 4096 items to be stored in one block! The Item Drum can be upgraded using the Item Drum Upgrade to a maximum of 256 stacks (16384 items)

<details>
  <summary>Recipes</summary>
  Colorful Item Drums

![Wooden Item Drum Recipes](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/colorfulItemDrums.gif?raw=true)

  Wooden Item Drums
  
  ![Wooden Item Drum Recipes](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/woodenItemDrums.gif?raw=true)
</details>

## Upgrades
### Width / Height Upgrade
The Width and Height upgrades allow for inventories to be increased in size, each block / item has configurable default and maximum sizes
<details>
  <summary>Recipes</summary>
  Width Upgrade
  
  ![Width Upgrade Recipe](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/widthUpgrade.gif?raw=true)

  Height Upgrade

  ![Height Upgrade](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/heightUpgrade.gif?raw=true)

  Upgrade Swaps

  ![Upgrade Swaps](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/upgradeSwaps.gif?raw=true)
</details>

### Retainer Upgrade
Can be used on the Chest, Barrel and Item Drum allowing them to keep contents when broken!

<details>
  <summary>Recipe</summary>
  
![Retainer Upgrade Recipe](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/retainerUpgrade.gif?raw=true)

</details>

### Void Slot Upgrade
Can be used to add a 'void slot' to Chests, Barrels and Backpacks. Items inserted into the void slot are deleted, useful for clearing out your inventory!

![Void Slot Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2955f7e96316c63502ec3a130d66d053eb6e6c51.png)

<details>
  <summary>Recipe</summary>
  
![Void Slot Recipe](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/voidUpgrade.gif?raw=true)

</details>

### Item Drum Upgrade (new!)
Can be used to upgrade Item Drums in increments of 8 stacks all the way up to 256 stacks!

<details>
  <summary>Recipe</summary>
  
![Item Drum Upgrade Recipe](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/recipes/itemDrumUpgrade.gif?raw=true)

</details>

## Any of the storage options can be dyed in world!

![Dyeing the chests in world](https://github.com/witchica/compact-storage/blob/gh-pages/docs/public/dyes.gif?raw=true)

# Modpacks
You may use CompactStorage in any of your modpacks! All I ask is that you credit me and link back to this page!

# Issues
If you ever come across any bugs in CompactStorage or even think of features you would like to be added, you can create an issue over on my GitHub!
